task_snapshots.title: 382-03: git_context.py — git intelligence for agents
task_snapshots.description:
Create src/bernstein/core/git_context.py with git read operations for agent context:
- blame_summary(file_path, line_range=None): last 5 commits + authors for file
- hot_files(days=14): files with most commits in N days (top 5% by churn)
- cochange_files(file_path, depth=20): files that change together
- recent_changes(file_path, n=5): last N commits with message + diff stat

Create tests/unit/test_git_context.py covering all four functions.

Completion: all functions tested and passing.

[subtask of 28550c616824]
